resetDialog.title: Reset all settings?
resetDialog.description: Restores every setting to its default. This cannot be undone.

general.title: General
general.startOnBootDesc: Launch automatically when you log in
general.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep running in system tray when window is closed
general.gpuAccelerationDesc: Disable if you see rendering glitches (requires restart)

agents.title: Agent defaults
agents.defaultTypeDesc: Pre-selected when creating a new agent
agents.defaultModelDesc: Suggested model when configuring a new agent
agents.autoStartDesc: Start all configured agents when the launcher opens

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enableDesc: Show OS-level toasts for important events
notifications.note: Fine-grained per-kind muting and quiet hours are available from the bell icon at the top right.

network.title: Network
network.workspaceUrlDesc: Optional self-hosted Workspace server. Leave blank to use OpenAgents hosted Workspace.
network.httpProxyDesc: Used by agents and the launcher for outbound HTTP
network.noProxyDesc: Comma-separated hosts that bypass the proxy
network.note: Proxy values are persisted to launcher settings. Restart the launcher to apply.

language.title: Language
language.displayLanguageDesc: Choose the language used across the OpenAgents interface

updates.title: Updates
updates.autoUpdateDesc: Check for new launcher and agent versions on launch
updates.cannotUpdate: Current version {{version}} · this build can't update in place
